title: The Chocolate Room | Roots and Wings | Class 7th | English literature | Explanation
description:

Chocolates.. deep brown and milky, ones that melt in your mouth as soon as you put it in your mouth..one that tastes of raisins and nuts, and chocolates itself..I bet your mouth is already watering.
We all love chocolates, don't we? So does Charlie, a boy from a pitiable family. He wins a lottery ticket to Willy Wonka's chocolate factory, along with five other children. Let's follow them in their journey. The Chocolate Room has been adapted from the very famous book 'Charlie and the Chocolate Factory' by Roald Dahl.
